rina: ^NOUR: I can't talk to her. I don't even want to see her.
rina_start: ^NICK: "Woah, this is crazy! Are you seeing what I'm seeing?"
^NOUR: "This... this is one of the floors of the mall, isn't it? The top floor?"
^NICK: "What's with all those lights at the top of the elevator?"
^MS. SUWAN: "This floor was shut down months ago. There shouldn't even be electricity."
^NOUR: "We're in a place that shouldn't exist!?"
^NICK: "Maybe we're in some kind of liminal space!"
^NICK: "Y’know, liminal spaces? Weird alternate dimensions where everything feels off?"
^NICK: "A place where space and time aren’t acting as they should?!"
^MS. SUWAN: "We're not in a science fiction novel, young man."
^MS. SUWAN: "I have to call one of my higher-ups about this."
^Ms. Suwan checks her phone in an attempt to find a connection.
^MS. SUWAN: "Hmm. No signal and no WiFi."
^Nick pulls out his phone, then frantically taps on the screen.
^NICK: "Aw, man. Same! I can't play any of my phone games..."
^A petite girl with olive skin and dyed strawberry hair appears before the group.
^Her entire body is still, like a mannequin. A lifelike, breathing mannequin.
^MS. SUWAN: "You're not supposed to be here either, young lady."
^NICK: "Hey, did you miss the part where she mysteriously appeared in front of us!?"
^"Yeah. She was from my high school."

g-0: ^NICK: "Hello? Random girl that Nour recognizes? Do you see us?"
^RINA: "You have trapped yourselves in your pasts."
^RINA: "It's up to you to move on."
^NICK: "And what the heck was she talking about?"
^NICK: "...Well, looks like she turned off those weird lights."
^MS. SUWAN: "We must be hallucinating. That’s the only explanation I can think of to describe…"
^MS. SUWAN: "...Whatever it is that we are seeing."

s: ^"Maybe we hit our heads somewhere... Or a potential gas leak?"
^"Maybe this is all just a dream..."
^"If this floor was torn down, I don't think we could explain anything of this with logic."

c-3: ^MS. SUWAN: "That would be somewhat realistic. I want to agree, but..."
^MS. SUWAN: "This place would have been closed off more securely if there were any danger."
^MS. SUWAN: "Any problems would have also been reported to me."
^NICK: "I don't remember us hitting our heads anywhere, either!"
c-4: ^NICK: "Haha! Maybe none of us are even real. Ooo~!"
^NOUR: "Or drugs? This could be a bad trip..."
^NICK: "DRUGS?! What kind of drug would make up something like THIS?"
c-5: ^NOUR: "Wherever we are... it's definitely not the demolition site from before."
^NICK: "That's so cool! It's like we warped through some kind of elevator-shaped portal!"
^MS. SUWAN: "I'm not buying any of this."
^MS. SUWAN: "There is no such thing as a supernatural elevator or laminated spaces."

g-1: ^MS. SUWAN: "This is absurd. We need to go back."
^NOUR: "And it doesn't look like the doors will budge, either."
^NOUR: "No use in waiting for an elevator that won't come."
^NOUR: "We should try to find another way out of here."
^MS. SUWAN: "I have a map that I was using during my inspection."
^MS. SUWAN: "We can reference it if needed."
^NICK: "Well... While we're at it, and since we're already here..."
^NICK: "I wanna see if they still have games in the TopicSpot!"
^MS. SUWAN: "That's what you are worried about right now?"
^NOUR: "Honestly it's a start. Who knows, maybe we'll be able to ask someone for help there."
^Nour hesitates. Nick and Ms. Suwan look at her, expectedly.
^NICK: "We could find her again, and she could tell us."
^NICK: "Uh, Nour? Why aren't you saying anything—"
^MS. SUWAN: "We can find our own way out of here."
^NOUR: "I... I guess we could talk to her."
^NOUR: And she said we TRAPPED OURSELVES in the past?
^NOUR: What is there to move on from?

rina_branches: ^RINA: "I don't know why you're still upset. You're the one who blocked me out..."
^"Friends are supposed to be there for each other!"
^"I have to let go of what she did."

c-0: ^NOUR: "Friends are supposed to be there for each other, Rina, especially during hard times."
^NOUR: "But you weren't there for me at all on that day."
^Rina glances down at Nick, and up to Ms. Suwan.
^NOUR: "Interesting?! Of course I'm still thinking about it."
^RINA: "You aren't ready for this — not yet."
^RINA: "Come back when you've helped the others first."
^RINA: "Maybe then you'll know how to help yourself."
c-1: ^NOUR: "I don't know how to confront what you did to me."
^NICK: "Why even try things if you know it'll never work out?"
^NICK: "Giving up on stuff you know you could never succeed?"
^NOUR: That felt really personal to Nick. What made him lack self-esteem?
^NOUR: I wonder if I can encourage him to be more confident in himself?
c-2: ^NOUR: "What happened made me so, so angry. And I'm still angry."
^NOUR: "I don't know how to let go."
^MS. SUWAN: "Then don't. Why dwell on the past?"
^MS. SUWAN: "You were right back then, and you're still right now."
^MS. SUWAN: "Don't waste your time thinking about it. Forget it entirely."
^NOUR: Ms. Suwan seems to be avoiding her past, and is trying to get me to do the same...
^NOUR: I'm not sure if I should listen to her.
^NOUR: <i>But maybe... I can help her come to terms with her past more?<i>
c-3: ^NOUR: I can't go through all the ways I could talk to her again about what happened.
^NOUR: I'll just try to help Nick and Ms. Suwan first.
g-0: ^Rina's eyes glaze over briefly. She returns to her familiar demeanor.

rina_final: ^RINA: "You're almost ready to move on from the past..."
^The sound of a power generator starting up can be heard from the hallway.
^RINA: "I fixed the elevator that you all broke."
^NICK: "How the heck did you know how to do that?"
^MS. SUWAN: "You don't exactly seem old enough to know how to fix an elevator."
^NICK: "Maybe she controls the mall with her magical powers..."
^NOUR: "I guess we can get out of here now?"
rina_bandn: ^NOUR: I don't know how the hell Rina got in here, but regardless...
^NOUR: I can't believe we were ever friends.

s: ^"I haven't seen you since graduation."
^"I guess this is what I get for coming back to the mall."

c-0: ^NOUR: "I wish I could've kept it that way."
^RINA: "We don't speak for years, and this is how you greet me?"
^RINA: "Well, fine. I see how it is."
c-1: ^NOUR: "I was really hoping I wouldn't run into you."
^RINA: "We don't speak for years, and this is how you greet me?"
^RINA: "You know, I'm allowed to exist here just as much as you, Yousra."

s: ^"Yousra?"

c-2: ^NOUR: "Nobody calls me that anymore. I go by Nour now."
^RINA: "...At least you're talking to me again."
^NOUR: "...I can't see what it's a good start to."
^RINA: "It's because I know you want to keep talking about what happened."
^RINA: "About what happened back then? That lunch with our friends..."
^NOUR: "I would prefer not to, but I have a feeling you're going to keep going anyway."
^RINA: "We started talking about, well, you know..."

s: ^"You were quiet
^"I had just come out to you."

c-0: ^, while others went on about how being gay is gross and haram."
^RINA: "That doesn't mean I agreed with them."
^RINA: "I didn't even tell them that you're gay!"

g-1: ^RINA: "I didn't tell your secret to anyone. Isn't that what you wanted?"

s: ^"Thanks for that..."
^"I know you didn't."

c-3: ^NOUR: "I'm mad that you didn't even try to disagree with what they were saying."
^NOUR: "You made it seem like you were on their side. Not mine."
c-4: ^NOUR: "Like I said back then, I appreciate you keeping it private."
^NOUR: "I don't appreciate that you didn't even try to disagree with what they were saying."
^NOUR: "You made it seem like you were on their side. Not mine."

s: ^"They were quoting everything like parrots..."

c-5: ^NOUR: "Like how they all thought people should keep their bad urges to themselves."
^NOUR: "That legalizing gay marriage would lead us down a slippery slope!"
^RINA: "What did you want me to do about it?"
^RINA: "Make everyone suddenly unlearn what our parents taught us?"
^RINA: "What our Middle-Eastern, Muslim parents taught to our friends?"

s: ^"I wanted you to be my ally..."
^"I wanted you to disagree with them."

c-0: ^NOUR: "I wanted you to say that you support queer people."
^NOUR: "Or, at least that we're supposed to love all of god's creations."
^RINA: "If I told them I'm an ally..."
^RINA: "They would think I'm supporting something that's haram!"
^NOUR: "In front of the person that's actually gay?"
c-1: ^NOUR: "I wanted you to argue that they're just brainwashed by their parents."
^RINA: "But if I disagreed with them, they would be suspicious of me."
^NOUR: "In front of the person that's actually in danger?"

s: ^"Well, imagine how I feel!"
^"You can still choose to be 'normal' at the end of the day."

c-6: ^NOUR: "I'm the one whose basic rights were being debated."
c-7: ^NOUR: "But I can't change how I am."

g-4: ^RINA: "I know that. But I said that I'm sorry."
^NOUR: "You know I wouldn't throw away ten years of friendship."
^RINA: "But you know what would've happened if I said something then?"
^RINA: "They would've told their siblings, and their cousins..."
^RINA: "And then people's parents would find out."
^RINA: "And all our parents know each other, so they'd all know."
^RINA: "Then my parents would get mad, too."
^RINA: "I was just looking out for the both of us!"
^RINA: "I told you, I didn't feel any different about you after you came out..."
^RINA: "It's not like you could help it. I know that."
^RINA: "But you were the one who didn't want to hear it."
^RINA: "I didn't even get a chance to make it up to you."

s: ^"It's too late. The damage is done."
^"How was I supposed to know you were telling the truth?"
^"You still don't get it, do you?"

c-8: ^NOUR: "I knew if my best friend couldn't stand up for me..."
^NOUR: "It would be a long time before anyone would."
c-9: ^NOUR: "My parents told me nothing would change how they feel about me, too."
^NOUR: "I knew that being gay would prove that wrong."
c-10: ^NOUR: "You can't just pick and choose when to be a good friend."

rina_topicspot: ^NOUR: Like Nick said... I can do it.
^NOUR: I helped him be more confident. I should be the same way.
^NOUR: "Why would I want to keep being friends with you?"
^NOUR: "A coward who couldn't stand up for me?"
^RINA: "You can call me a coward. I don't care."
^RINA: "But don't you get where I'm coming from?"

s: ^"You're not the victim here."
^"I get that you don't have principles."

c-0: ^NOUR: "You just watched our 'friends' say all of that stuff about people like me."
^RINA: "I know I'm not the victim, but you have to admit..."
^RINA: "They would have hated both of us if I said something."
c-1: ^NOUR: "You don't believe in anything enough to fight for it."
^RINA: "I do believe that queer people deserve respect."
^RINA: "But I had to play it smart."
^RINA: "I knew they would hate both of us if I said something."
g-0: ^RINA: "You know, I'm not the bad guy here."
^RINA: "I'm not the one who said what they said."

s: ^"You might as well have."
^"I know..."

c-2: ^NOUR: "Being complacent is the same thing as agreeing."
c-3: ^NOUR: "You just stayed neutral. Not the best or the worst response."

g-1: ^RINA: "You're speaking up now because you wish I had back then. Right?"
^RINA: "But I'm not the person you really want to confront."
^RINA: "You want our homophobic friends to know their place."
^RINA: "You closed yourself to any possiblity for me to support you."
^RINA: "We were both afraid and inexperienced. But I could've learned..."
^RINA: "Did you have so little faith in me?"

neverknow: ^RINA: "Nour, neither of us had the guts to say anything back then."
^RINA: "You'll never know what would have happened if I spoke up."
^RINA: "I hope this isn't the way you wish our conversation had gone."
^NOUR: She's right. This way was no good.
^NOUR: I was way too aggressive. I would've only push her away further.
^NOUR: Acting this way would've just burn her and myself.
^NOUR: ... Looks like this wasn't the right way to handle what happened.

rina_hallway: ^NOUR: I helped Ms. Suwan let go of her broken friendship. Maybe I should, too.
^NOUR: Just completely forget and let go. Like it never happened...
^NOUR: "Whatever. You know what? I'm not mad anymore."
^NOUR: "It's fine. I don't know why I was so upset."
^RINA: "Really? Because a moment ago, you were huffing about how much I hurt you."
^RINA: "Like, how it's my fault that it's hard for you to trust anyone now."

s: ^"Nope, forget it.
^"Sometimes, people who care about you will hurt you."

c-0: ^RINA: "You're gonna move on, just like that? After ignoring me for three years?"

s: ^"Well, yeah.
^"I was hurt, so I needed time.

c-0: ^ Clearly, you're not going to admit that you were wrong.
c-1: ^ Time heals all wounds, or something..."
^NOUR: "It's just a part of life, I've accepted that now."
^RINA: "I see. So you're really okay with expecting me to hurt you again?"

s: ^"I guess I am.
^"So you admit that you hurt me?

c-0: ^ I should always expect those I love to hurt me."
c-1: ^ You admit that you were wrong?"

admitwrong: ^RINA: "That's all you want? For me to admit that I was wrong?"
^RINA: "Fine, I was wrong. I admit it. And I wish I didn't hurt you."
hurtme: ^RINA: "I know I hurt you... I'll admit, I was wrong."
^RINA: "... And I can't take back what I did."
toolate: ^NOUR: "Whatever. The people I care about, trust, and open up to..."
^NOUR: "They're all bound to hurt me, one way or the other."
^RINA: "I hope this isn't the way you wish our conversation had gone."
^RINA: "But it's too late for that. You closed the door on me, right?"
^RINA: "I didn't actually get the chance to say any of this."
^RINA: "Would be a realistic solution? Because, I mean..."
^RINA: "You still think about me no matter how hard you try not to."
^RINA: "And passively accepting that the people you care about will always hurt you..."
^RINA: "Do you really want to live your life that way?"
neverknow: ^RINA: "You missed your chance to forgive me, Nour."
^RINA: "You'll never know what would have happened if you forgave me."
^NOUR: That was too avoidant of me. I can't passively accept all the pain like that...
^NOUR: To the point of ignoring everything that happened.
^NOUR: ... Looks like this wasn't the right way to handle what happened.

rina_elevator: ^MS. SUWAN: "Nour, think back to when you were friends with Rina."

s: ^"Rina, you were

c-0: ^ the only person who understood me."
^MS. SUWAN: "Nour, you helped me with my old friends."
^MS. SUWAN: "You helped me tell them what I wish I could have told them sooner."
^MS. SUWAN: "You've already told Rina what you wish you could've said..."
^MS. SUWAN: "And it isn't working for you."
^MS. SUWAN: "You need to face the past, Rina... everything."
^NICK: "You've helped us. Now it's our turn to help you."
^NICK: "We'll be behind you every step of the way, too."
^NOUR: "I remember what I told you, when I first came out..."

s: ^"My family didn't help me feel comfortable."
^"I needed to feel like I wasn't alone."

c-0: ^NOUR: "They'd make backhanded comments about how homosexuality is haram."
^NOUR: "How it was a terrible 'choice' to make."
^NOUR: "Our friends showed how they felt in that cafeteria discussion."
^NOUR: "But I knew you would never say those things to me."
c-1: ^NOUR: "I couldn't share how I felt with my family..."
^NOUR: "Because they'd warn me that acting on it is haram."
^NOUR: "I couldn't tell any other friends, point proven by that cafeteria discussion."
^NOUR: "But I knew I had you because you were always there for me."
^NOUR: "You made sure I was never alone."

g-0: ^NOUR: "And when I felt like you weren't looking out for me..."
^NICK: "Is it actually about her saying nothing?"

s: ^"I'm scared of people turning on me."
^"I couldn't bring you down with me."

c-1: ^NOUR: "If I left you first, you wouldn't even have a chance to make me feel bad."
c-2: ^NOUR: "I guess I felt like you were better off not being associated with me."
^NOUR: "It seemed like you would have been happier that way."

g-1: ^NOUR: "When I say it out loud, it feels silly."
^NOUR: "I'm still mad at you, but I don't think I want to be."
^NICK: "You know, I do the stuff I do because..."
^NICK: "I guess because I'm frustrated at the world."
^NICK: "But I'm actually mad at myself, 'cause I can't be how people want me to be."

s: ^"I can't change Rina."
^"I can't take back my own choices."

c-3: ^NOUR: "I'm mad that she didn't say anything..."
^NOUR: "But I'm also mad that I didn't say anything."
c-4: ^NOUR: "I already made them. I'm really mad at myself for doing what I did."
^NOUR: "Maybe even more than I was mad at Rina."

g-2: ^NOUR: "And it all came back to me feeling like running away was a better choice."
^NOUR: "... And I can't change what Rina did."
^NOUR: "I can't change what I did. It's in the past."
^NOUR: "It's up to both of us to move forward."
^NICK: "And we're here now, whether you like it or not."
^MS. SUWAN: "Correct, because Rina here is blocking the way."

s: ^"With or without you..."

c-5: ^NICK: "Now, shall we move on? Because I believe it is..."
^MS. SUWAN: "Please don't break the elevator again."
^NICK: "... Nour! Are your coming or what?"

rina_help: ^NOUR: "Friends are supposed to help each other."
^NOUR: "You weren't helping me that day, but..."
^RINA: "Seems like you're helping your new companions."
^RINA: "Would you consider them to be your friends?"
^NOUR: Maybe I'm ready to explore all possible outcomes from talking to Rina.
^NOUR: I'll try to talk to her again.

first: ^NOUR: "I'm being told that I'm ready to confront you, but..."
^RINA: "Nour, don't you remember all the pictures we took together?"
^RINA: "When we were just two kids with a camera, capturing memories."
^NOUR: With the polaroid camera that my dad got...
repeat: ^NOUR: Rina wants me to remember when we took pictures together.
^NOUR: We used a polaroid camera that my dad got from this mall.
^NOUR: ... I wonder if I can still find it around her?
